data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to confirm the requirement for review platforms integration, but there is no evidence provided that demonstrates this functionality is operational. The linked use case mentions the need for review platforms, yet lacks concrete API interactions or state checks that would validate their integration. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of successful integration with review platforms (Google, Yelp, Trustpilot).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for review platform integration
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that review platforms (Google, Yelp, Trustpilot) are integrated and operational.
